Package com.gpudb.protocol

Class ExportQueryMetricsRequest.Options

java.lang.Object
com.gpudb.protocol.ExportQueryMetricsRequest.Options
Enclosing class:
ExportQueryMetricsRequest
public static final class ExportQueryMetricsRequest.Options extends Object
A set of string constants for the ExportQueryMetricsRequest parameter options.

Optional parameters.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    EXPRESSION
    Filter for multi query export.
    static final String
    FILEPATH
    Path to export target specified as a filename or existing directory.
    static final String
    FORMAT
    Specifies which format to export the metrics.
    static final String
    JOB_ID
    Export query metrics for the currently running job.
    static final String
    JSON
    Generic JSON output.
    static final String
    JSON_TRACE_EVENT
    Chromium/Perfetto trace event format.
    static final String
    LIMIT
    Record limit per file for multi query export.

  • Field Details

    • EXPRESSION

      public static final String EXPRESSION
      Filter for multi query export.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • FILEPATH

      public static final String FILEPATH
      Path to export target specified as a filename or existing directory.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • FORMAT

      public static final String FORMAT
      Specifies which format to export the metrics. Supported values:
      • JSON: Generic JSON output.
      • JSON_TRACE_EVENT: Chromium/Perfetto trace event format.
      The default value is JSON.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • JSON

      Generic JSON output.

      Chromium/Perfetto trace event format.

    • JOB_ID

      public static final String JOB_ID
      Export query metrics for the currently running job.

    • LIMIT

      public static final String LIMIT
      Record limit per file for multi query export.
